reviews.comment:
Atencion no es acorde a los precios exagerados. Se destaca el sandwich de jamon crudo

(Translated by Google)
The service doesn't match the exorbitant prices. The prosciutto sandwich is a highlight.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBaE9pY2JBEAE

reviews.comment:
Lo califico nada más que con 3 estrellas por que la atención es buena, pero considero que deben mejorar la parte estética del lugar, tanto el exterior cómo la del interior, en lo que se refiere a  baños deben mejorar la higiene y en cuanto a la cofiteria está bastante abandonada en su ambientación y decoracion. Es una critica constructiv. Saludos

(Translated by Google)
I'm only giving it 3 stars because the service is good, but I think they should improve the aesthetics of the place, both inside and out. The bathrooms need better hygiene, and the coffee shop is quite neglected in terms of ambiance and decor. This is constructive criticism. Regards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRX2RiSVNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy descuidado el salón de ventas y comidas. Falta de limpieza y organización para un regreso de fin de semana extralargo como lo fue el del 1ero de mayo.

(Translated by Google)
The sales and food court area was very neglected. It lacked cleanliness and organization, especially considering the long weekend that began on May 1st.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnX1BQbmh3RRAB
